result.stdout:
Usage:
	unity-packer pack <output> [(<input-file> <target-path>)]...
	unity-packer unpack <input-file> <output-folder>
Example:
	unity-packer pack MyPackage.unitypackage MyFile.cs Assets/MyFile.cs
	unity-packer unpack MyPackage.unitypackage MyProjectFolder
